title: Lysi's Oasis
description: Changes desert biome, adding a new feature - oasis!
body:
# Lysi's Oasis Datapack

## About
Lysi's Oasis is a Minecraft datapack that introduces a oasis feature to transform desert biome, adding both beauty and functionality to your Minecraft experience!

## Features
- **Oasis Generation:** Explore the desert biome to discover naturally occurring oases!
- **Aesthetic Enhancement:** Bringing new life and visual appeal to the desert!

## How to Use
1. **Installation:**
    - Download the datapack from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com).
    - Place the datapack in the "datapacks" folder of your Minecraft world.

2. **Explore and Enjoy:**
    - Venture into the desert biome to witness the newfound beauty of oases.
    - Gather resources, build, and create within these lush environments.

## Additional Information
- **Feedback and Support:** For feedback, bug reports, or additional support, visit the [discord server](https://discord.gg/43jTVSa5zB).
